---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a platform improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Here2ServeU
---

**Domain**
<!-- Terraform / Ansible / CI/CD / Kubernetes / GitOps / Observability / FinOps / AIOps / Migration -->

**Problem this solves**
<!-- What operator pain point, compliance gap, or capability limit does this address? -->

**Proposed solution**
<!-- Concrete outline of the change. Call out which files/modules would move. -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- What else did you weigh, and why this over those? -->

**Blast radius**
<!-- Which environments / targets would this affect? Any backwards-compat concerns? -->

**Additional context**
<!-- Links to related runbooks, PRs, incidents, or external references. -->
